name: Alps-LED-PolarityMarked (ai03 MX_V2)
description: In-switch indicator LED aligned to the switch footprint (polarity marked). Imported from the ai03 MX_V2 keyboard library (MIT, (c) ai03); passed PartReel quality gates. Verified-2D part. Official KiCad libraries carry no hotswap / low-profile / hybrid switch footprints.
dimensions_source: ai03 MX_V2@0b379ee (Switch_Misc.pretty/Alps-LED-PolarityMarked.kicad_mod) — designed from scratch from official switch datasheets per upstream README

modifications: symbol authored by PartReel (upstream pairs with stock KiCad symbols by design)
remapped Dwgs.User outline to F.Fab (keyboard libraries avoid silk under the keycap)
added minimal silk pin-1 marker (hidden under the mounted switch)
